nl: If the input is valid, persist it; otherwise show an error.
Send an email and write an audit log in parallel, then stop.
Repeat reading data and generating diagrams until there is no more data.
A user clicks submit; the frontend calls the backend API and returns the result.
On failure return an error; on success return 200; retry up to 3 times.
From Idle to Processing; when done go back to Idle; cancel ends the flow.
Order has composite substates Created, Paid, and Shipped.
